●AI-Powered Business Automation

Automate the future. Power your business with AI.

Fluxia replaces repetitive workflows with intelligent automation — so your team can focus on what truly matters. Deploy AI agents in minutes, not months.

SOC 2 Compliant 99.9% Uptime SLA Trusted by 500+ teams
The problem

Why most businesses are stuck on manual

Legacy processes and disconnected tools create friction that costs you time, money, and growth. Sound familiar?

Hours lost to manual work

Teams spend up to 40% of their week on repetitive, low-value tasks that could be automated in minutes.

Disconnected data silos

Critical business data is scattered across tools that don't talk to each other, causing blind spots and delays.

Slow decision-making

Without real-time insights, decisions lag behind market changes — costing opportunities every day.

Scaling costs ballooning

Growing your team to handle volume is expensive. Operational costs scale linearly when they shouldn't.

Human errors compounding

Manual data entry and handoffs create mistakes that propagate downstream, eroding customer trust.

Delayed customer responses

Slow response times frustrate customers and increase churn — your competitors respond instantly.

Our products

Everything you need to automate with confidence

A modular suite of AI tools designed to work alone or together — adapting to your business as you grow.

FluxBot

AI Chat & Support

Resolve 80% of customer queries instantly with AI agents that understand context, tone, and intent — 24/7.

FluxFlow

Workflow Orchestration

Visually design and automate multi-step business processes across your entire tech stack without code.

FluxInsight

Predictive Analytics

Turn raw data into predictive intelligence. Forecast trends, detect anomalies, and act before issues arise.

FluxAgent

Autonomous AI Agents

Deploy self-directed AI agents that research, decide, and act on your behalf across complex workflows.

FluxOps

Operational Intelligence

Monitor and optimize operations in real time. Spot inefficiencies and automate corrective actions instantly.

FluxSync

Smart Integrations

Connect 200+ apps in one click. Data flows seamlessly between your CRM, ERP, and every tool in your stack.

Use cases

Automation for every team

No matter your industry, Fluxia adapts to your workflows and delivers measurable results fast.

Finance

Automate financial operations end-to-end

From invoice processing to fraud detection, Fluxia empowers finance teams to close faster, report accurately, and stay compliant — without adding headcount.

  • Automated invoice matching & AP processing
  • Real-time fraud detection with AI scoring
  • Regulatory compliance monitoring
  • Predictive cash flow forecasting
70%

reduction in processing time

Average results reported by Fluxia customers after 90 days.

How It Works

From setup to scale — in four steps

Fluxia is built to get you running fast. Most teams are automating their first workflow within a day.

01

Connect your tools

Integrate your existing software stack in minutes. Fluxia supports 200+ native integrations — from Salesforce and HubSpot to Slack, Notion, and your internal APIs.

02

Configure your workflows

Use our visual builder to map out your processes — no coding required. Set triggers, conditions, and actions with a drag-and-drop interface designed for business teams.

03

Automate at scale

Activate your workflows and let Fluxia handle the rest. AI agents execute tasks, make decisions, and handle exceptions — all with full observability.

04

Measure and optimize

Monitor performance through real-time dashboards. Identify bottlenecks, iterate on workflows, and scale what's working across your entire organization.

Ready to automate your first workflow?

Setup takes less than 10 minutes. No credit card required.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

Starter

Lead

128/mo
  • 5 active workflows
  • 10,000 automation runs / month
  • 1 user seat
  • 10 integrations
  • FluxBot (basic)
  • Email support
  • Community access
Most Popular

Starter

For growing teams that need more power and flexibility.

149/mo
  • 25 active workflows
  • 100,000 automation runs / month
  • 5 user seats
  • 10 integrations
  • Unlimited integrations
  • FluxBot + FluxFlow + FluxInsight
  • Priority email & chat support
  • Advanced analytics dashboard
  • Custom triggers & webhooks

Starter

Tailored for large organizations with complex needs and compliance requirements.

Custom
  • Unlimited workflows
  • Unlimited automation runs
  • Unlimited user seats
  • All Fluxia products included
  • Dedicated AI agent infrastructure
  • SLA-backed uptime guarantee
  • Dedicated success manager
  • SSO, SAML, advanced security
  • Custom reporting & data exports
